features.name: Right Atrium
features.description: Receives deoxygenated blood from the body via the vena cava.

features.name: Left Atrium
features.description: Receives oxygenated blood from the lungs via pulmonary veins.

features.name: Right Ventricle
features.description: Pumps deoxygenated blood to the lungs through the pulmonary artery.

features.name: Left Ventricle
features.description: The most muscular chamber, pumps oxygenated blood to the entire body.

features.name: Aorta
features.description: The largest artery, carries oxygenated blood from the left ventricle.

features.name: Frontal Lobe
features.description: Controls executive functions, decision making, and voluntary movement.

features.name: Parietal Lobe
features.description: Processes sensory information including touch and spatial awareness.

features.name: Temporal Lobe
features.description: Processes auditory information, memory, and language.

features.name: Occipital Lobe
features.description: Primary visual processing center of the brain.

features.name: Cerebellum
features.description: Coordinates balance, posture, and motor learning.

features.name: Right Upper Lobe
features.description: Uppermost section of the right lung.

features.name: Right Middle Lobe
features.description: Between horizontal and oblique fissures.

features.name: Right Lower Lobe
features.description: Extends to the base of the lung.

features.name: Left Upper Lobe
features.description: Contains the cardiac notch.

features.name: Left Lower Lobe
features.description: Separated by the oblique fissure.

features.name: Renal Cortex
features.description: Outer region for initial blood filtration.

features.name: Renal Medulla
features.description: Contains pyramids and loops of Henle.

features.name: Renal Pelvis
features.description: Collects urine and channels it to the ureter.

features.name: Hilum
features.description: Where blood vessels and ureter enter/exit.

features.name: Right Lobe
features.description: The larger lobe of the liver, responsible for most metabolic functions.

features.name: Left Lobe
features.description: Smaller lobe, extends across the midline.

features.name: Portal Vein
features.description: Carries nutrient-rich blood from digestive organs.

features.name: Gallbladder
features.description: Stores bile produced by the liver.

features.name: Fundus
features.description: Upper rounded portion, often contains gas.

features.name: Body
features.description: Main central region where digestion occurs.

features.name: Pylorus
features.description: Controls passage of food to the small intestine.

features.name: Cardia
features.description: Where esophagus meets the stomach.

features.name: Cornea
features.description: Transparent front surface that refracts light.

features.name: Iris
features.description: Colored part that controls pupil size and light entry.

features.name: Lens
features.description: Focuses light onto the retina.

features.name: Retina
features.description: Light-sensitive layer that converts images to nerve signals.

features.name: Optic Nerve
features.description: Transmits visual information to the brain.

features.name: Pinna (Outer Ear)
features.description: Collects and funnels sound waves.

features.name: Ear Canal
features.description: Channels sound to the eardrum.

features.name: Tympanic Membrane
features.description: Vibrates in response to sound waves.

features.name: Cochlea
features.description: Spiral-shaped organ that converts vibrations to nerve signals.

features.name: Skull
features.description: Protects the brain and supports facial structures.

features.name: Vertebral Column
features.description: 33 vertebrae protecting the spinal cord.

features.name: Rib Cage
features.description: 12 pairs of ribs protecting heart and lungs.

features.name: Pelvis
features.description: Supports upper body and connects to lower limbs.

features.name: Femur
features.description: Longest and strongest bone in the body.

features.name: Enamel
features.description: Hardest substance in the body, protects the crown.

features.name: Dentin
features.description: Makes up bulk of tooth structure beneath enamel.

features.name: Pulp Chamber
features.description: Contains nerves and blood vessels.

features.name: Root
features.description: Anchors tooth in jawbone.
